title: ZXBrick Leaderboards
description: How to use the ZXBrick leaderboard flow to compare scores, track sessions, and improve play quality over repeated short games.
summary: Leaderboards provide short-term comparison points and help convert short sessions into long-term progression loops.
sourceNotes: Leaderboard list is confirmed by the public app metadata.
Exact filtering, ranking regions, and seasonality rules are to verify in game center metadata.

sections.heading: Overview
paragraphs: ZXBrick currently publishes a highest-score leaderboard.
Use this list to compare replay consistency across sessions and validate training results.

sections.heading: Build reusable comparisons
paragraphs: Use one leaderboard goal per short cycle to prevent noisy comparison behavior.
Track session date and focus mode for each score comparison.

faq.question: What is shown on the ZXBrick leaderboard?
faq.answer: The current published category is highest score.
